---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: zaryif
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you are proposing.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve? Who would benefit from it?

## Proposed Solution

How should this feature work? What should the command or behavior look like?

```bash
# Example usage
quran <new-command>
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, references, links to similar features in other projects, etc.
